summary: Parses a comma-separated string into an array of fields with ordinary space padding removed from each field.
signature_intent: Accepts a string and returns an array of comma-delimited field values.
behavior: Splits the input at each comma.
Removes leading and trailing ASCII space characters from each field.
Preserves spaces that occur inside a field between non-space characters.
Preserves all non-comma characters other than trimmed boundary spaces.
Always returns an array, including the final field after the last comma.
edge_cases: An empty input returns an array containing one empty string.
Consecutive commas produce empty fields between them.
A leading comma produces an initial empty field.
A trailing comma produces a final empty field.
Fields containing only ASCII spaces become empty strings.
Only ASCII space is trimmed; tabs and other whitespace are treated as field content.
